typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		name as string,
		emplid as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   cast( left((e.first_name + \' \' + e.last_name),35) as varchar(35)) AS name, e.emplid FROM         [ps_hcm].[ps_ph_hr_job_req] AS r INNER JOIN                       [ps_hcm].[ps_ph_req_empl_asg] AS c ON r.job_req_nbr = c.job_req_nbr INNER JOIN                       hr.dim_employee AS e ON c.ph_recruit_advisor = e.emplid GROUP BY e.first_name + \' \' + e.last_name, e.emplid',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource	source(output(
		advisor_key as short,
		name as string,
		emplid as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_advisor',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE
OLEDBSource,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(OLEDBSource@emplid == LookupLKPTABLE@emplid,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
Lookup select(mapColumn(
		name = OLEDBSource@name,
		emplid = OLEDBSource@emplid,
		advisor_key = advisor_key
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupSelect
LookupSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@Match sink(input(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> Updatedimadvisor
LookupIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		emplid as string,
		name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		emplid,
		name)) ~> OLEDBDestination
